name: Rod of Seven Parts
description:
Eons ago, a war between the primordials and the gods scarred the planes of existence. A demon lord named {@creature Miska the Wolf-Spider|VEoR} eventually pushed the primordials' enemies to the brink of annihilation.
Desperate to save themselves and their allies, powerful elemental beings called the Wind Dukes of Aaqa rose against Miska. Committed to the concept of law, the Wind Dukes descended from a people called the vaati, who once ruled many worlds. Seven Wind Dukes wove their power into an
